name: DO *NOT* PRESS THE RED BUTTON — seriously...just don’t.
description:
You see that red button? Guess what? DONT PRESS IT! Don’t give into temptation. Why don’t you go AHED and walk past it...

WOAOAOAOAOH! A red button! Pretty neat. Just don’t press it. You never know what will happen when you go pressing random buttons-

((Enjoy this weird thing I made on the way back from a car trip. See you in whatever timeline I come back in-))

((Oh yeah, give me any ideas on what to add to this because I’m genuinely geeked until finals show up))

Hey but on a serious note; should I release the first character I made?? Like I have her fully developed and all but I just haven’t released her to the public yet-
creator: YourDumbPerson
